response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK passport
ATTR passport : varchar : PK
ATTR customer_name : varchar
ATTR customer_surname : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date

ENTITY Seat
PK flight_number, seat_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR seat_number : varchar : PK

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR airport_location : varchar
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK license_number
ATTR license_number : varchar : PK
ATTR airplane_model : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status : varchar
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_hour : time

ENTITY CrewMember
PK license_number
ATTR license_number : varchar : PK
ATTR crew_role : varchar

ENTITY FlightCrew
PK flight_number, license_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR license_number : varchar : PK : FK

REL Flight -> Airline : 1..N -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 2 : FK=airport_departure, FK=airport_arrival
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=license_number
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1..N -> 1 : FK=status_code
REL Flight -> Seat : 1..N -> 1..N : FK=flight_number
REL Flight -> FlightCrew : 1..N -> 1..N : FK=flight_number
REL FlightCrew -> CrewMember : 1..N -> 1 : FK=license_number
